title: astragalus montanus var. tegetarius
intro: Astragalus montanus var. tegetarius, also known as the Tegetarian milkvetch, is a plant species in the legume family that is native to the mountainous regions of the western United States. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus montanus var. tegetarius include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress, and improve overall well-being. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or infusate, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
